creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #3)
Damn.

Please, accept my apologies.

Sometimes bugzilla is really happy to accept changes in even when other people made changes since I loaded the page the first time (other times, bugzilla warns if I *really* want to submit the changes).

I should have press F5 before assigning the PR.

Sorry again.
